BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: NEW YORKERS FAMILY RESEARCH FOUNDATION INC

IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: To protect human life promote strong families preserve religious freedoms and proclaim justice and mercy. To educate and inform interested persons in NYS on core issues through publications seminars emails alerts website videos radio broadcasts speakers and events through out the state.
IRS990.MissionDesc: To protect human life promote strong families preserve religious freedoms and proclaim justice and mercy. To educate and inform interested persons in NYS on core issues through publications seminars emails alerts website videos radio broadcasts speakers and events through out the state.
IRS990.Desc: News letters and legislative updates are mailed periodically to approximately 11,000 interested persons and weekly email updates to approximately 25,000 constituents to inform on family religious freedoms sanctity of life and moral issues.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: Education: via publication seminars website social media radio broadcasts direct mailing speakers and events around the state in person and via zoom. Banquets brunches and pastors briefings

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: New Yorker's Family Research Fdt has an "H" option in place but no funds were spent on lobbying or any political candidate's campaigns.
Cancellation of our annual state wide event held at the NYS Capital Convention center for the 2nd year due to Covid 19 restrictions.
The Board Secretary records meeting minutes to be permanently filed in company files.
The Office Manager and Auditor completes the 990s; the President reviews and signs it. These reports are then made available for all Board members to review.

A written conflict of interest policy is signed by each board member. Knowing persons have a duty to expose any conflict of interest; whereupon the Board will the address the covered person giving them opportunity to respond and allow for corrective or disciplinary actions to be implemented.
The Board of Directors reviews and determines salary and raises for the President. The President evaluates and determines all other personnel raises.
Government and Financial documents are made available to interested persons upon request
